---
# REQUIRED FIELDS
title: Delphi studies in social and health sciences -Recommendations for an interdisciplinary
  standardized reporting (DELPHISTAR) . Results of a Delphi study
acronym: DELPHISTAR
description: |-
  Reporting Delphi studies in the health and social sciences

  DELPHISTAR checklist ([Word](https://www.equator-network.org/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/RG_DELPHISTAR_engl-2.docx))         DELPHISTAR checklist [(PDF](https://www.equator-network.org/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/RG_DELPHISTAR_engl-1.pdf))
doi: ''
pmid-id: '[39186713](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/39186713/)'
pmid-url: https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/39186713/
relevant-urls: '[Read the full-text](https://journals.plos.org/plosone/article?id=10.1371/journal.pone.0304651)
  of the DELPHISTAR guideline.'
full-bibliographic-reference: Niederberger M, Schifano J, Deckert S, Hirt J, Homberg
  A, Köberich S, Kuhn R, Rommel A, Sonnberger M; DEWISS network. Delphi studies in
  social and health sciences-Recommendations for an interdisciplinary standardized
  reporting (DELPHISTAR). Results of a Delphi study. PLoS One. 2024;19(8):e0304651.


# OPTIONAL FIELDS
rg-language: English
explanation-and-elaboration-papers: ''
guideline-history: ''
relevant-more: ''
website-url: <https://delphi.ph-gmuend.de/>
additional-languages: The DELPHISTAR Statement has been translated into German in
  [Word](https://www.equator-network.org/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/RG_DELPHISTAR_ger.docx)
  | [PDF](https://www.equator-network.org/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/RG_DELPHISTAR_ger.pdf).
additional-information: |-
  Read the reviews that informed the development of DELPHISTAR:

  Spranger J, Homberg A, Sonnberger M, Niederberger M. Reporting guidelines for Delphi techniques in health sciences: A methodological review. Z Evid Fortbild Qual Gesundhwes. 2022;172:1-11. PMID: [35718726](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/35718726/)

  Niederberger M, Spranger J. Delphi Technique in Health Sciences: A Map. Front Public Health. 2020;8:457. PMID: [33072683](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/33072683/)
relevant-editorials: ''
primary-guideline: ''
other: 'The DELPHISTAR project was registered at the OSF platform and can be assessed
  on this page: <https://osf.io/gc4jk>'
other-relevant-research: ''


# LIST FIELDS
study-design:
# - Animal pre-clinical research
# - Artificial intelligence/Machine learning studies
- Clinical practice guidelines
# - Clinical trials
# - Diagnostic and prognostic studies
# - Economic evaluations
# - Experimental studies
# - Letters to the editor/Correspondence
# - Mixed methods studies
# - Observational studies
# - Other
# - Patent landscapes
- Qualitative research
# - Quality improvement studies
# - Reliability and agreement studies
# - Study protocols
# - Systematic reviews/Meta-analyses/Reviews/HTA/Overviews
# - No study design specified
clinical-specialty:
# - Allergy
# - Anaesthesia
# - Audiovestibular medicine
# - Behavioural medicine
# - Cardiovascular medicine
# - Complementary and alternative medicine
# - Dentistry
# - Dermatology
# - Emergency medicine
# - Gastroenterology
# - Genetics
# - Haematology
# - Health informatics
# - Hepatology
# - Infectious diseases
# - Medical education
# - Neurology
# - Nuclear medicine
# - Nutrition and dietetics
# - Obstetrics and gynaecology
# - Occupational therapy
# - Oncology
# - Ophthalmology
# - Paediatrics
# - Palliative care
# - Pathology
# - Pharmaceutical medicine
# - Physiotherapy
# - Primary care
# - Psychiatry
# - Psychology
# - Public health
# - Radiology
# - Rehabilitation medicine
# - Renal medicine
# - Respiratory medicine
# - Rheumatology
# - Sport and exercise medicine
# - Surgery
# - Toxicology
# - Tropical medicine
# - Urology
- No clinical specialty specified
report-section:
# - Abstract
# - Acknowledgements
# - Appendix
# - Biospecimen/bioresource information
# - Conference paper/abstract
# - Conflict of interest
# - Data
# - Ethical issues (consent etc.)
# - Figures/Graphs
# - Funding
# - Harms/adverse effects/safety data
# - Images
# - Intervention (exposure)
# - Narrative sections (discussion etc.)
# - Outcomes (variables)
# - Procedure/Method
# - Protocol-whole report
# - Research recommendations
# - Results
# - Statistical analysis plan-whole report
# - Statistical methods and analyses
# - Study characteristics (participants etc.)
# - Terminology/definitions
# - Title
- Whole report
# - No report section specified
keyword:
- checklist
- checklists
- consensus
- Delphi
- Delphi studies
- Delphi study
- DELPHISTAR
- DELPHISTAR checklist
- DELPHISTAR guideline
- guideline
- guidelines
- 'Remove term: DELPHISTAR guideline DELPHISTAR guidelines'

---

{{< include ../_template.qmd >}}
